data.body: STACK COMMIT 5 (#6 code-impact albite-lazy-barb): e9a36e568. decide.impact_code (two-lane tier-tagged MAX: prod=MAX(correctness tiers)*trig_likelihood[common1.0/sometimes0.6/rare0.25]; maint=MAX(maint tiers)*freq[0.5+0.5*min(churn90,30)/30]; impact=max(min(1,MAX(lanes)*amp[silent1.0/else0.8]), rev_floor[0.6 iff impact_base>0 AND one-way-door surface]). verify.code_review_verification_model (CodeSeverityAttrs extends base5 + 10 binaries + trigger_likelihood + silent_failure/escapes_automation). contracts.py registers code_review_verification; code-review.yaml verify output_schema + code-review-verify.md outputs: front-matter switched + additive prompt block. code_review_decide DET-enriches churn90+hard_to_reverse_surface into VERIFICATION dict severity_attributes (NOT finding dict) + impact_fn=impact_code; diff_text+changed_files wired from assemble_diff. fixture code_review_impact_labels.jsonl(31)+README + test_impact_code.py(30) + ADR0035. verify.py trimmed to 794 (under 800 cap). Plan re-review after 3-BLOCK remediation: PASS+signed, verified_at_sha=23581b171(tip at claim). Claimed w/ REBAR_GATE_REF=tip. lint+mypy clean, 920 affected tests green. 5/8 committed. NEW STACK TIP e9a36e568 -> use as REBAR_GATE_REF for #8/#3. Closes DEFERRED to Gerrit Verified.
